clusters.rationale: These stories directly exercise Button.tsx and are the most immediate consumers of the comment-only marker line added to Button.tsx.
Overlay stories (popover, modal, tooltip, tooltipnote, tooltipprovider) transitively import Button.tsx and share the overlay namespace root cause.
All manager-namespaced stories (sidebar, layout, mobile, notifications, settings, main, iframe, panel, components) transitively import Button.tsx through shared manager UI primitives.
Stories under the components namespace (tabs, toolbar, bar, card, collapsible, togglebutton, actionlist, tooltip-message) transitively import Button.tsx through shared component library.
All addons-namespaced stories (docs, accessibility, vitest, onboarding) transitively import Button.tsx through shared Storybook UI primitives.

Catch-all for stories not matching a more specific namespace prefix — covers component-testing, controls, actions, highlight, interactive, select, and other misc namespaces all transitively importing Button.tsx due to the comment-only marker addition.

content.text: The diff is a comment-only change (adding `// AGENT_EVAL_MARKER`) to Button.tsx. All stories are affected because they all import Button.tsx transitively. Let me cluster by top-level namespace.
